title: Acquisition — Phase 2
description: Build the channels, campaigns, and conversion points that turn the Research message into repeatable pipeline. Paid, search, outbound, content, and CRO working together.
audience: Best for teams that have run scattered experiments and need a repeatable acquisition rhythm. Retainer from £7k/mo.
promise: You get campaigns, measurement, and conversion points working together, not as separate tasks owned by four different people.
outcomes: Channel strategy tied to stage, margin, and learning velocity
Landing pages and offers built around buying triggers
Measurement that connects activity to pipeline, not just clicks
Weekly iteration rhythm for campaigns and conversion points
process: Select the acquisition motions that fit the stage and margin profile
Build campaign assets and landing page structure from the Phase 1 message
Set up measurement around pipeline, CAC, and learning velocity
Review weekly and scale only the motions showing signal
